_comment: Human verdicts on ttn_rebroadcast multi-play merge candidates that are NOT merges — the same forces recording two genuinely different works. Recorded by candidate_id (the 8-hex hash shared with ttn_audit). Read back as a suppression filter; append an entry whenever a candidate is triaged and rejected.

rejected.reason: different acts of one opera-ballet — Act 2 vs Act 3, distinct pieces fused by high title-token overlap
titles: "La Caravane du Caire (opera-ballet in three acts): Act 3
La Caravane du Caire (opera-ballet in three acts): Act 2

rejected.reason: the four distinct concerti of The Four Seasons (RV 269/315/293/297) — titles without an RV ref fuse via Jaccard on shared 'Four Seasons' tokens; the season name (Spring/Summer/Autumn/Winter) is not a numbered locator or key, so neither guard fires
same Four Seasons false-positive pattern, on the 'rearranged' variants — also already in ttn_audit_decisions.json under the same composer
Dream Pantomime and Overture are distinct orchestral excerpts of Hänsel und Gretel, bridged via Jaccard through the 'Dream Pantomime - from Hansel and Gretel' middle title
titles: Dream Pantomime - from Hansel and Gretel

rejected.reason: movement-vs-whole-work fusion: 'Missa Sancto Job: Kyrie' is one movement of the mass, not the same as the complete 'Missa Sancto Job'; the colon-and-movement-name pattern is not recognised by the excerpt-locator guard
